body.title: Granny worker registry — CC.0 + DickSimnel.0 dispatch with availability semaphores
body.text:
# D-granny-worker-registry-2026-06-02
**title:** Granny worker registry — CC.0 + DickSimnel.0 dispatch with availability semaphores
**date:** 2026-06-02
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-granny-availability-semaphore, T-granny-dispatch-config, T-granny-cc0-dispatch, T-dicksimnel-device, T-consequence-granny-worker-registry
**goal_link:** factory-of-factories
**concept_links:** none (docs section: build workflow and resource flagging — to be created)

## Decision narrative
Granny's dispatch loop will be refactored from hardcoded worker logic to a config-driven, generic worker registry. Each worker (CC.0, DickSimnel.0, Igor) registers availability via {name}.available.true/false file semaphores in ~/.granny/available/; .false wins over .true. Dispatch rules live in config/profiles/granny.yaml — time window, usage threshold, concurrency — not in Python. Three worker types: CC.0 dispatched via tmux send-keys to claude-main (not spawn); DickSimnel.0 as a new rack device (OR-powered persistent coding agent, named after Dick Simnel from Raising Steam); Igor via existing IMAP. "Busy" detection replaces the GRANNY_THROTTLED-producing tmux session count with an in_progress queue check.

## Hypothesis
Granny dispatches CC.0 and DickSimnel.0 tickets without hardcoded time checks — availability is controlled entirely by semaphore files, and the dispatch rules live in config.

## Measurement Signal
GRANNY_CC0_OFFER|ticket=T-xxx appears in the channel during idle window; DickSimnel.0.available.true absent/present changes dispatch without Granny restart.

## Goal Link
factory-of-factories (autonomous round-the-clock ticket dispatch enables the self-improving factory)

## Concept Links
none (docs section: build workflow and resource flagging — to be created as C-xxx)

## Semaphore protocol
- {worker_id}.available.true — file present = worker available (opt-in)
- {worker_id}.available.false — file present = blocked, overrides everything
- CC.x.available.false — blocks new CC spawn class (does NOT affect CC.0)
- granny.queue.available.false — pauses Granny's dispatch loop without stopping the device
- Same protocol universally: CC.0, DickSimnel.0, Igor, Granny itself

## HIGH-INERTIA note
T-granny-cc0-dispatch touches devices/granny/daemon.py (2026-06-01 runaway file).
Design is send-keys to existing session (not spawn). Akien approved inline 2026-06-02.

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
